name: Floramon

signature_move.name: Allergy Shower
signature_move.description: Spreads allergenic pollen from its hands that causes the enemy to lose the will to fight.

description: A rare Digimon that evolved like a reptile but is categorized as a Plant type, much like Palmon . Its whole face has the appearance of a flower, and its head is usually protected by its petal-styled shell like a helmet. When intruders are not around or when it's in a good mood, the petals on its head and both of its arms open up wide. It sees Palmon as its rival, and has a very prideful personality. Its Special Move is producing allergy-inducing pollen from the flowers on both of its arms ( Allergy Shower ). Those who suffer this technique, even larger Digimon, will become unable to maintain their composure and end up completely losing their fighting spirit.
